name: Clearfield YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Clearfield YMCA in Clearfield, PA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to lights, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: DuBois YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at DuBois YMCA in DuBois, PA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Houtzdale Woodward Recreation Park
description: Houtzdale Woodward Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Houtzdale, PA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Recreation park is open 7 days a week from dawn to dusk.

name: Irvin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Irvin Park in Curwensville, PA! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. The facility is wheelchair accessible.

name: Treasure Lake Captain Kidd Park
description: Treasure Lake Captain Kidd Park is a place to play pickleball in DuBois, PA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food and restrooms. The courts are free.
